footnotes.text: In all things: i.e., in all things that pertain to the right relationship of husband and wife. Note well that the subjection inculcated in these verses is not a brutal or slavish subjection as to a tyrant, but that of the loved one to her lover, who is according to right order head of the family, as Christ is head of the Church.
The bath of water: the Sacrament of Baptism.
